title: Vanilla Plus++
description: Datapack that aims enhance the vanilla experience
body:
# About:
**Have you ever felt like Minecraft doesn't make sense?, items added but without purpose, this datapack tries to fix that**

Vanilla Plus++ is a vanilla-like quality of life expansion, adding features to Minecraft with the aim of enhancing the vanilla experience with things that make sense to have in the game but don't and generally making it more enjoyable to play.

Having features like copper armor and tools, new items boss drops and recipes, all working WITHOUT RESOURCE PACK NEEDED

# Features
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

## - Copper Utilities: 
basically all you can do with iron, you can make with copper
including saddle and armor for horses (will be in the recipes tab)

![Copper Utilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02cebf05164bfe1996a190b042c96b971efb2465.png)

## - Help Wanted:
a new way to get villagers to help you, no more kidnappings; Now you can make a banner and when you place it a villager appears after approximately 10 minutes

![Help Wanted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/848f8174895cc7595d1631738678a01763251f09.png)
after a villager arrives is needed replace the banner to come another
</details>


<details>
<summary>Ocean Features</summary>
  
## - Ocean Features
![Ocean1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a783d9654ac6f3743c943812243e65ce7fcf1ac6.png)

![Ocean2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d79180b658431f40238724b5c2fb80cb0e3321c.png)
Holding Heart of Sea allows you and friends in 10 blocks of distance move freely trough the water, with the Breather  equiped gives the same benefits without need hold anything but only works for you

Holding Glow ink Sac make you Glow, its useful to find your friends

</details>

<details>
<summary>More Features</summary>

<details>
<summary>Magic/Rituals</summary>
## Magic
  
works droping items in the same place, like crafting some special items like the eternal elytra of this datapack,but some of them can be casted holding the amethyst shard in off-hand and dropping the another item

![m1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4802eb6d0eca919fc5b7ca1f3cba40f469615ac3.png)

![m2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87a12f0bd75e61ad0e87872326531f5e1269fa0e.png)

![m3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a452337a894a85361a82644642bc37f3072f357.png)

i have plans to make more spells but if you have any ideia please share in discord

</details>


## SUPPORT AND RECOMMENTATIONS
this is my first datapack, maybe have some bugs in multiplayer but i make to work fine with friends, i have plans to bring more and more features as long i learn more about making datapacks, any idea that should be in game share in discord

Discord: [https://discord.gg/DseuWt9k](https://discord.gg/DseuWt9k)

**this datapack was inspired bye "Vanilla Refresh" by limesplatus, my datapack and his work very well together**
